sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88610" key="prosanafusa/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσανα-φῡσάω</orth>, <sense id="n88610.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">play on the flute</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0497.tlg001:69:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">69.6</biblScope> </bibl> (leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προανα-</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
